meta_description: Zhejiang Karn New Building Materials Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of Carboxymethyl Starch (CMS), products used in textile, construction, coating, paper industries, providing high-quality, eco-friendly CMS products and OEM/ODM services.
keywords: Hangzhou Karn, CMS manufacturer, building materials company, 23 years experience, carboxymethyl starch factory

hero.title: About Hangzhou Karn New Building Materials Co., Ltd.
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Carboxymethyl Starch (CMS) Specialist

company.title: Company Profile
company.paragraph1: Established in 2010, Hangzhou Karn New Building Materials Co., Ltd. is a company specializing in the research, development, production, and sales of Carboxymethyl Starch (CMS). After years of development, we have become a well-known high-quality Carboxymethyl Starch supplier in the industry.
company.paragraph2: We have modern production equipment and a professional R&D team, providing high-performance, environmentally friendly Carboxymethyl Starch products to global customers. Karn's products are widely applied in textile printing, construction materials, coating industry, paper processing and other fields, highly recognized for their excellent performance and stable quality.
company.paragraph3: In addition to our standard product series, we also provide comprehensive OEM/ODM services, customizing product formulations, packaging, and branding according to specific customer requirements. As a socially responsible company, we are always committed to environmentally friendly production and sustainable development.

advantages.title: Our Advantages
advantages.subtitle: Why Global Customers Choose Karn's Carboxymethyl Starch Products

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: We employ a rigorous quality control system with each batch of products undergoing multi-stage testing to ensure compliance with international quality standards.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: With 23 years of industry experience, our technical team is proficient in Carboxymethyl Starch formula development and production processes, serving multiple industry sectors.

eco.title: Environmental Commitment
eco.description: Our products use renewable plant starch as the main raw material, are low-pollution, non-toxic, and safe, meeting international environmental standards.

service.title: Comprehensive Service
service.description: We provide full-spectrum support from product development and technical assistance to after-sales service, ensuring customer satisfaction.

history.title: Company Development History
history.subtitle: Key milestones from founding to becoming an industry leader

events.founding: Company established in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, focusing on Carboxymethyl Starch R&D and production.
events.expansion: Expanded production facilities and introduced advanced automated production lines, significantly increasing capacity and expanding multi-industry applications.
events.international: Began expanding into international markets, with Carboxymethyl Starch products exported to multiple countries in Asia, Europe, and North America.
events.present: Deepened multi-industry application R&D, products now cover 6 major fields including textile, construction, coating, and paper industries, strengthening global market presence and brand building.

strength.title: Core Strengths
strength.subtitle: 23 years of professional production experience, comprehensive quality management system, providing reliable products and services to customers

production.title: Strong Production Capacity
production.description: Equipped with modern production equipment and automated production lines, with sufficient annual production capacity to meet the needs of customers of different scales. Strict control from raw material procurement to finished product delivery.

quality.title: Strict Quality Assurance
quality.description: Established a comprehensive quality management system, with each batch of products undergoing multiple quality inspection procedures. 23 years of industry experience in production processes ensure stable and reliable quality in every batch.

delivery.title: Efficient Delivery Service
delivery.description: Complete warehousing and logistics system, with long-term cooperation with multiple logistics companies. Regular products are in stock, customized products are delivered on schedule, ensuring smooth customer production plans.

cta.title: Ready to Start Cooperation?
cta.description: Whether you need high-quality Carboxymethyl Starch products or are looking for OEM/ODM customization services, we can provide the best industry solutions for you.
